Soothe tired eyes and relax facial tension with this jade stone eye mask. Made from small polished jade pieces woven together, it delivers a gentle weight and natural coolness that helps de-puff the eye area and promote a feeling of deep relaxation.

Features

  • Natural jade stone: Each piece is unique, providing a luxurious spa-like experience at home or in the salon.
  • Cooling effect: Naturally cool to the touch; can be placed in the fridge before use for extra refreshment.
  • Relieves eye fatigue: Helps reduce the appearance of puffiness and signs of tiredness around the eyes.
  • Relaxing weight: The soft pressure of the stones promotes relaxation and helps release facial tension.
  • Ideal for facials and spa rituals: Perfect during mask time, massage, or at the end of a treatment.
  • Reusable & easy to clean: Simply wipe with a soft damp cloth and dry after use.

Size

Approx. 27 cm (width) x 21 cm (height).

Colour and stone pattern may vary slightly due to the natural properties of jade.

products.title: Scalp Massage & Shampoo Brush
products.body_html:

Features

  • Soft Silicone Bristles – Gentle on the scalp, perfect for daily use.
  • Ergonomic Handle – Comfortable anti-slip strap for easy grip, even in the shower.
  • Deep Cleansing – Helps remove dandruff, buildup and excess oil.
  • Stimulates Hair Growth – Enhances blood circulation to the hair follicles.
  • Suitable for All Hair Types – Straight, curly, natural, dry or oily hair.
  • Waterproof & Durable – Made from high-quality, long-lasting materials.

How to Use

  • Apply shampoo to wet hair.
  • Use the brush in circular motions to massage the scalp.
  • Rinse and allow the brush to dry after use.

Available Colors

  • Blue
  • Pink & Mint
  • Yellow & Orange
  • White & Grey

Upgrade your washing routine with this must-have tool for a cleaner, healthier, and more relaxed scalp.

products.body_html:

  • Adjustable length: Add or remove magnets to choose the exact length you want for nail tips.
  • Strong magnetic grip: High-quality magnets stay securely attached during shaping and cutting.
  • Compatible with nail cutters: Designed to fit most standard nail tip cutters for accurate and uniform trimming.
  • Ideal for long nail shapes: Perfect for XL, XXL and dramatic shapes such as tapered square, coffin, stiletto and more.
  • Flexible & easy to use: Magnets can be used individually or stacked together depending on your needs.
  • High durability: Solid metal magnets resistant to bending and long-lasting performance.

These magnetic shaping sticks are the perfect tool for nail technicians who want flawless, consistent and precise nail lengths every time.
